title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd
company: Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Visual Merchandiser at Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is actively seeking a talented and motivated Visual Merchandiser to join our dynamic team in Vadodara. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Asian Paints Signature Store Consulting Pvt Ltd!
